desc:
The waters of the sea are very still here, so still that they bring a feeling
of peace and comfort.  They are not the dead calm that always is associated with
dread in a sailor's heart but a slowly moving roll that promises a good day at
sea.

name: Calm Waters

desc:
The calm sooth mind and body, lending a feeling of peace and comfort to any
traveler who passes.  The waves roll gently by, the ocean seeming harmless and
worry-free.  A rock littered shore lies to the north, so jumbled and covered in
rock as to be unpassable.
name: At the Shoreline

desc:
The water is a gently rolling calm here that seems to go on forever.  The sky
and the water match almost exactly, so blue the water and so clear the sky.  A
rock littered shore lies to the north, so jumbled and covered in rock as to be
unpassable.
name: At the Shoreline

desc:
The water has grown tumultous and rough here, the waves not high but
frequent.  Water splashes into the air as the small waves spalsh into each
other.  A rock littered shore lies to the north, so jumbled and covered in rock
as to be unpassable.
name: At the Shoreline

desc:
The wind has picked up a bit and has caused the sea to begin to churn a bit,
the water bobbing and jumping rapidly.  Every now and again a small fish can be
seen jumping up from the wake, searching for food on the surface.  A rock
littered shore lies to the north, so jumbled and covered in rock as to be
unpassable.
name: At the Shoreline

desc:
The sea has turned to calm that is almost unsettling.  Any sailor would bow
their head and say a quick prayer to the Sea God at this time to pray for a wind
of some sort.  Looking in all directions, the sea is still and quiet.  A rocky
shore is to the north, its boulder riddled area too cluttered to be passed
along.  A long jetty lies to the east running south into the ocean, a tall
lighthouse at its end.
name: At the Shoreline

desc:
The waters of the sea do not seem to move at all, not even with the usual
gentle up and down sway that all seas have.  Looking to the horizon, the waters
seem to go on forever.
name: Placid Waters

desc:
There is no current and no winds.  The waters stand still and unmoving here
with no sign of change coming any time soon.  These are the types of waters that
sailors have nightmares about.
name: Placid Waters

desc:
A good, steady wind blows from the east, making sea travel swift and easy in
this area.  The sea's currents move with the direction of the winds, at least on
the surface and help to lend direction to the traveler.
name: A Swift Wind

desc:
A solid wind blows up from the east, carrying with it the tang and fresh
scent of the sea and all it's creatures.  There are little to no clouds anywhere
in the sky, the world seeming limitless from this perspective.
name: A Swift Wind

desc:
This area of the sea is carried along by a strong undercurrent which moves
the water in its own direction, regardless of the wind or weather topside.
name: A Strong Current

desc:
These constant winds are what ensures that commercial boating types can move
their cargo from one continent to another.  The wind blows from the west without
cessation.
name: Among the Tradewinds

desc:
The water has become rough and choppy, the crests of the waves rising with
froth and foam.  The sky above is getting a bit darker than what most would be
comfortable with.  Best to get a move on.
name: Wild, Foaming Crests

desc:
A strong wind blows out of the east carrying along the sea and all things
upon it.  The waters move along at a steady, ryhtmic pace.
name: Among the Tradewinds

desc:
The constant wind that blows out of the east pushes the sea along at a steady
pace, along with all that is upon it.  The tang and swill of the sea assails
from the wind blowing so constant, giving the day a fresh, new feeling.
name: Among the Tradewinds

desc:
The water rises and falls with such force that it seems the world must be
shaking on its foundations.  The water splashes and crashes against itself, foam
and froth all over the surface of the sea.
name: Wild, Foaming Crests

desc:
Waves crash and slam against each other in a constant swirl of motion, spray
and foam spitting high into the air.  The sky has darkened, looking just a bit
stormy.
name: Wild, Foaming Crests

desc:
A dense fog has rolled in, making it hard to see for any distance.
Everything seems to have gotten very quiet, making it almost surreal in this
area.
name: In the Fog

desc:
A thick fog has rolled in over the ocean's surface, obscuring what lies ahead
and making it almost impossible to see more than a few feet ahead.  Things seems
to have gotten just a little too quiet.
name: In the Fog

desc:
The rain comes down in steady sheets of tiny raindrops.  It does not appear
that there will be any thunder or lightning any time soon, just a steady dismal
downpour.
name: A Drizzling Rain

desc:
A calming, fresh breeze blows in bring the fresh scent of the open sea and
the tang of salt with it.  The sea appears to be cooperating with travel, only
gentle swells at this point.
name: A Gentle Breeze

desc:
A blinding storm has erupted across the seas, causing the water to jump from
casual swells to the fifteen foot walls which are now completely surrounding
this area.  Rain lashes down, stinging the sea with its driving force.
name: Among Fifteen Foot Waves

desc:
Waves crush down in giant walls in every direction, the winds howls
unceasingly as the rain is driven harder and harder against the sea's surface.
name: Among Fifteen Foot Waves

desc:
The rain falls in a steady drizzle that soaks to the bone, but does not cause
any harm.  The wind has all but died out, making the rain all the final and
somber.
name: A Drizzling Rain

desc:
The fresh breeze that blows past is a calm, gentle one that can only be
called dreamy.  A sailor in these winds would gladly lie on the deck of his ship
with his tankard of grog beside and happily think of the whores he has known,
never once having the desire or need to get up and work.
name: A Gentle Breeze

desc:
All around is the wide open expanse of the sea, its mighty presence so
strong, so overwhelming as to be staggering.  From horizon to horizon, only blue
sky and a deeper blue can be seen.
name: Upon the Mighty Sea

desc:
A long rock jetty with a lighhouse at its end runs out into the sea.  It
appears that climbing the rocks to the jetty's walkway might be hazardous to
one's health, so another way up must be found.  The shore lies just north of
here, but that too is covered in rock and scree and appears unclimbable.
name: West of the Jetty

desc:
A long rock jetty with a lighhouse at its end runs out into the sea.  It
appears that climbing the rocks to the jetty's walkway might be hazardous to
one's health, so another way up must be found.
name: West of the Jetty

desc:
A long rock jetty with a lighhouse at its end runs out into the sea.  It
appears that climbing the rocks to the jetty's walkway might be hazardous to
one's health, so another way up must be found.
name: West of the Jetty

desc:
A long rock jetty with a lighhouse at its end runs out into the sea.  It
appears that climbing the rocks to the jetty's walkway might be hazardous to
one's health, so another way up must be found.
name: West of the Jetty

desc:
A tall lighthouse stands at the end of a rock jetty which juts out into the
sea.  The rocks which form the jetty look exceptionally large and sharp - sharp
enough, in fact, that they do not warrant an attempt at climbing.  It seems that
another way to the lighthouse will have to be found.
name: South of the Jetty

desc:
A long jetty made of jumbled rock pokes out into the sea, a lighthouse
perched at its end.  Fisherman sit along the sides of the jetty, hoping to catch
a little luck and maybe some dinner along with it.  There does not appear any
way to get west onto the jetty's walkway from the sea.
name: Near the Jetty

desc:
A long jetty made of jumbled rock pokes out into the sea, a lighthouse
perched at its end.  Fisherman sit along the sides of the jetty, hoping to catch
a little luck and maybe some dinner along with it.  There does not appear any
way to get west onto the jetty's walkway from the sea.
name: East of the Jetty

desc:
A tumbled rock jetty lies to the west, a small home and lighthouse perched at
the end.  The water swirls and splashes at the rocks, their sharp ends cutting
into the water.  It does not appear safe to attempt climbing those rocks to the
lighthouse.
name: East of the Jetty

desc:
A tumbled rock jetty lies to the west, a small home and lighthouse perched at
the end.  The water swirls and splashes at the rocks, their sharp ends cutting
into the water.  It does not appear safe to attempt climbing those rocks to the
lighthouse.
name: East of the Jetty's End

desc:
A solid wind blows up from the east, carrying with it the tang and fresh
scent of the sea and all it's creatures.  There are little to no clouds anywhere
in the sky, the world seeming limitless from this perspective.
name: A Swift Wind

desc:
This area of the sea is carried along by a strong undercurrent which moves
the water in its own direction, regardless of the wind or weather topside.  The
beach area to the north has begun to get covered in rocks, making it unsafe to
attempt travel onto land.  It looks a bit more safe to the east.
name: A Strong Current

desc:
These constant winds are what ensures that commercial boating types can move
their cargo from one continent to another.  The wind blows from the west without
cessation.
name: Among the Tradewinds

desc:
The water has become rough and choppy, the crests of the waves rising with
froth and foam.  The sky above is getting a bit darker than what most would be
comfortable with.  Best to get a move on.
name: Wild, Foaming Crests

desc:
A strong wind blows out of the east carrying along the sea and all things
upon it.  The waters move along at a steady, ryhtmic pace.
name: Among the Tradewinds

desc:
The constant wind that blows out of the east pushes the sea along at a steady
pace, along with all that is upon it.  The tang and swill of the sea assails
from the wind blowing so constant, giving the day a fresh, new feeling.
name: Among the Tradewinds

desc:
The water rises and falls with such force that it seems the world must be
shaking on its foundations.  The water splashes and crashes against itself, foam
and froth all over the surface of the sea.  A sandy beach lies just to the
north, running along the length of a steep cliff face.
name: Wild, Foaming Crests

desc:
Waves crash and slam against each other in a constant swirl of motion, spray
